result: The data has been successfully preprocessed according to the requirements. The raw survey datasets from four waves were loaded and merged using `NSID`. For ages 14 and 15, the continuous weekly income was preserved (as `inc14` and `inc15`) and then banded into categories (`inc14_band`, `inc15_band`) to match the measurement at ages 16 and 17 (`inc16_band`, `inc17_band`). Missing-value codes were harmonized across all waves using the specified mapping: -3 (Not yet paid) to -1, -1 (Don't know) to -8, -992 to -9, and -996 to -3. All NAs were converted to -3. The final output consists of the `NSID` and the six derived variables, saved as a CSV file at `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
